overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing Aloy walking through a vibrant post-apocalyptic landscape with red blight vegetation, passing tribal NPCs, crossing a bamboo bridge through a tunnel, and approaching a settlement with ornate organic architecture.

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking steadily through red blight vegetation toward a group of NPCs gathered on a rocky outcrop

notable_agents.action: tribal villagers standing on rocky outcrop observing the surroundings

entered.detail: giant tree-like structures with platforms and hanging vines dominating the background
ground covered in vibrant red corrupted vegetation with vein-like patterns
elevated rock formation where NPCs are gathered

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks through an open field covered in red blight vegetation toward a rocky outcrop where tribal NPCs stand. Massive organic tree structures rise in the background under a partly cloudy morning sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy clearing with tribal gathering area

events.description: passing from red blight area into green grassy field with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: passing by NPCs on the rocky outcrop and moving into an open grassy area

notable_agents.action: tribal villager in yellow-green attire standing on the rocks

entered.detail: large intricate metal structure resembling ancient machinery or art installation
open area with green grass replacing the red blight vegetation

segments.scene_description: Aloy passes the NPCs on the rocky outcrop and transitions into a grassy clearing. A large metal gear sculpture becomes visible in the distance while the massive tree structures shift to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: path through grassland with organic arch structures

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path through tall grass toward organic arch structures

entered.detail: large curved structures made of intertwined branches and vegetation forming archways over the path
tall green grass flanking the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Aloy continues along a dirt path through tall grass, approaching large organic arch structures. The environment is open and empty of NPCs, with distant mountains visible under the morning sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: bamboo bridge leading into covered tunnel

events.description: beginning ascent onto elevated bamboo bridge structure
entering covered tunnel with dimmer lighting and hanging woven lanterns

agents.ego_description: climbing bamboo stairs and walking through a covered tunnel section

notable_agents.action: tribal guard standing at the tunnel entrance

entered.detail: elevated walkway constructed of bamboo poles with moss growing between them
enclosed passage made of woven branches and wood with dim interior lighting
decorative woven baskets hanging from the tunnel ceiling emitting warm light

segments.scene_description: Aloy ascends a bamboo bridge leading into a covered tunnel. The lighting shifts to a warmer, dimmer tone inside the tunnel where woven lanterns hang from the ceiling, and a guard stands near the entrance.

events.description: exiting tunnel into open area with large ornate settlement arch ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the settlement entrance with smoke rising in the distance

notable_agents.action: villager standing near the tunnel exit observing the approach

entered.detail: large elaborate archway structure marking the entrance to the village with intricate carvings
white smoke rising from fires or steam vents near the settlement entrance
suspended woven containers hanging from elevated structures

segments.scene_description: Aloy exits the tunnel into an open area approaching a large ornate settlement arch. Smoke rises near the entrance where hanging baskets are visible, and the environment transitions back to bright natural lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, blight-stricken wilderness into the sheltered entrance of an ornate tribal settlement. It begins with Aloy walking through a field of red vegetation toward tribal NPCs on a rocky outcrop, with massive organic tree structures looming under a partly cloudy morning sky. As she passes the NPCs and enters a grassy clearing, the perspective shifts to reveal a large metal gear sculpture in the distance while the towering trees move to the periphery. The camera then follows her along a dirt path through tall grass and under organic arches before ascending a bamboo bridge into a dim, lantern-lit tunnel. Finally, the scene transitions back to bright natural light as she exits the tunnel and approaches a large settlement arch adorned with hanging baskets and rising smoke.
